title: Mechanism of Decontamination Quality Control During Emergency Consequences Elimination
author: Taraduda D.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The necessity of development of the Standard operating procedure for decontamination of personnel and casualties that have fallen into the zone of defeat in emergency situations at radiation and chemically dangerous objects as a mechanism for quality management and, as a consequence, an increase in the efficiency of decontamination is substantiated. The structure of the Standard Operating Procedure, the content of its main structural elements is defined.
